_provenance: Canonical transformations are claim-categories competitors ASSERT, not validated customer transformations — true transformation is a later VOC/review-mine finding.
_anti_fluke_floor: 2+ brands at scale; 7+ day ad longevity to qualify a creative. These floors are surfaced here for Phase 2 decision-time use — Phase 1 never hard-gates on them.
_comparable_bet_seed_note: Brands tagged comparable_bet_seed:true (arduboy, flipper-zero, nothing-phone, skeleton-key) are BET-EVIDENCE — they demonstrate 'novel-hardware-as-lead bet won durably at scale.' Their brand counts are EXCLUDED from per-cell saturation exactly as dead/region-only brands are excluded from live saturation (D-08). Two jobs kept separate: they prove the bet, not the cell.

combos._note: Comparable_bet_seeds (arduboy, flipper-zero) EXCLUDED from brand_count per D-08 + brief. They are bet-evidence, not saturation-evidence. Adafruit also excluded — claims array is empty (catalog page, no verbal transformation claims typed).

combos._note: Arduboy excluded (comparable_bet_seed); meowbit excluded (page 404, no claims captured).

Anbernic excluded from typed claims (no verbal claims captured from their page). Miyoo excluded (defunct/region-only, D-08). Analogue Pocket 'No emulation' is a problem-UM frame (disqualifying alternative), typed as direct — it's a bare identity statement.

combos._note: Single brand — below the 2+ anti-fluke floor. Not saturated.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page leads: 'open source — Learn to code and create your own games'; ATmega32U4 Arduino-IDE-flashable hardware positioned as the headline differentiator; '300+ Games' and community-made content second.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — in maker-identity × maker-diy cell: claims are sparse direct statements ('Learn to code and create your own games', '300+ Games'). Floor: just state the claim.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page leads with 'itty-bitty game system' miniaturization as the headline; 'Probably the World's Smallest Game Console' (Nintendo Life) used as the primary trust signal. Smallness IS the differentiator, not the software or community alone.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — direct claim only ('itty-bitty game system...easy learning tool all-in-one'). No quantified or mechanism-bound claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page leads: 'portable multi-tool for pentesters and geeks in a toy-like body' — the exotic hardware breadth (CC1101, RFID, NFC, IR, BLE, GPIO, iButton) IS the headline. The dolphin-personality framing wraps serious hardware in a collectible-object frame.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 2 — enlarged claims present: 'Sub-1 GHz...up to 50 meters' (range-specified), 'up to 28 days battery life' (quantified). Floor: a sharper/specified claim.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Brand identity = transparent back + Glyph Interface LED lights as the product's reason-to-exist. Current homepage: Charli xcx campaign, 'changing how things are done — with music and machines for a new generation.' The design/aesthetic hardware IS the differentiation, not specs.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — homepage at fetch time showed no typed verbal claims for the phone hardware (dominated by headphone campaign). Prior brand positioning: direct identity claim (transparent/glyph design). Floor: just state the identity.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page leads: 'Playdate is familiar, but unlike anything you've ever seen' and the crank as the explicit headline feature. 'Is it a gimmick? Nah.' — anti-gimmick framing positions the unusual hardware as genuinely functional. The crank IS the brand identity.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — direct claim ('familiar, but unlike anything you've ever seen'). No enlarged or mechanism-bound outcome claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page is a product catalog with multiple form factors and price points (from $49.99 to $139.99). No verbal outcome claims captured — positioned on value and breadth of device options.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — no typed claims from clean corpus; position is implied by catalog breadth, not verbal claim.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Known marketplace positioning based on Finder research: Miyoo Mini positioned on compactness and emulation breadth at budget pricing. Site offline at fetch time; basis from prior knowledge of brand.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — no claims captured (site offline); brand excluded from live saturation counts (defunct/region-only per D-08).

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page title: 'The ultimate Maker store - Pimoroni' — positioned as the definitive maker electronics destination, not around a single product differentiator.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — identity claim only; no typed verbal transformation claims captured from this page.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: SparkFun Electronics — catalog of dev boards, kits, components. Positioned as 'electronics for makers'; no single-product differentiator claim.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — catalog page; no typed verbal transformation claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Identity: 'Adafruit Industries, Unique & fun DIY electronics and kits' — positioned as the maker's joyful electronics store; no single-product headline differentiator.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — catalog page; no typed verbal transformation claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page explicitly frames the no-case exposed PCB as a cost-mechanism AND aesthetic identity: 'by placing all vital and sensitive components under the LCD display there's no need for an outer case.' The naked circuit board IS the design.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 2 — enlarged claim present: 'studio quality sound...affordable for everyone' (specified quality level); '1 month battery life' (quantified). 'a wall of sound in your pocket' = direct. Floor: sharper/specified claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page: 'An Open Source Portable Game Console' — 'Ideal for Indie Game Developers, Hackers & Retro Games Collectors'. Open-source modular build is the headline. Crowdfunding origin validates bet durability.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — direct identity claim ('An Open Source Portable Game Console'). No enlarged or mechanism claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page: 'Pwnagotchi: Deep Reinforcement Learning for WiFi pwning!' — the open-source build process and hacker-community membership are the explicit value; 'an excuse to learn about reinforcement learning and WiFi networking'.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — direct identity claim. No commerce page.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Based on Finder research: Crowd Supply open-source hardware multi-tool with visible circuitry as the explicit aesthetic. Page returned 404 at fetch time; basis from Finder's research and brief seeding.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — no claims captured (page 404). Comparable_bet_seed — excluded from saturation.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page: 'Crisp and Vibrant Displays' and 'IPS LCD for Game Boy' — positioned on display upgrade quality for retro hardware modders. Sells transparent/clear shells as part of the aesthetic customization offer.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 2 — enlarged claim: 'Crisp and Vibrant Displays' with 'IPS LCD' (mechanism specified alongside quality descriptor). Floor: sharper/specified claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page: 'Completely engineered in *two FPGAs. No emulation.' — the FPGA hardware authenticity is the explicit lead differentiator, positioned against emulation as inferior.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 3 — mechanism claim present: 'A tribute to portable gaming. No emulation.' with 'Completely engineered in *two FPGAs' as the named mechanism. Outcome-tied-to-named-how = mechanism type. Also: '3.5", 615 ppi, LCD. 1600x1440 resolution' is an enlarged claim (quantified display spec). Floor: own mechanism/UM.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page: 'The biggest collection of classic, licensed video game cartridges' and 'Pixel perfect emulation' — licensed physical cartridges and accurate emulation are the twin differentiators.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 2 — enlarged claim: 'The biggest collection of classic, licensed video game cartridges' (superlative quantity claim). Floor: sharper/specified claim.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Based on Finder research: Meowbit is positioned as a 'codable console for MakeCode Arcade' — the programmable/educational angle is the lead. Product page 404 at fetch; basis from Finder research.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — no claims captured (page 404). Direct educational positioning implied.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page: 'PICO-8 is a fantasy console for making, sharing and playing tiny games' — the creative constraints and self-contained development environment are the lead differentiator; 'Create a whole game or program in one sitting'.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 2 — enlarged claim: 'Create a whole game or program in one sitting' (conditioned outcome: 'in one sitting' is a time/constraint specifier). 'The harsh limitations of PICO-8 are carefully chosen to be fun to work with' = mechanism rationale. Floor: sharper/specified claims.

per_brand.bet_type_basis: Page: 'Digital Art + Creative Hardware' and 'Bring personality, widgets and pixel visuals into your workspace' — the distinctive LED pixel-art display IS the product identity; visual expressiveness is the primary pitch.
per_brand.sophistication: Stage 1 — direct claims: 'Bring personality, widgets and pixel visuals into your workspace'. No quantified or mechanism-bound outcome claims.

saturation._note: 5 live in-geo non-seed brands (thumby, gameshell, pwnagotchi, pimoroni, sparkfun). Arduboy/flipper-zero excluded (comparable_bet_seeds). Adafruit counted as brand presence but no verbal claims typed. Not saturated — claims are Stage 1 direct; no mechanism or enhanced claims in cell.
thumby + pico-8. Arduboy excluded (seed). Meowbit: page 404, not counted. Stage 1.

analogue-pocket + evercade + bitboy. Anbernic counted as brand but no verbal claims typed. Miyoo excluded (defunct/region-only per D-08). Stage 2-3 range — analogue-pocket at Stage 3 (mechanism claim) but only 1 brand at that stage; 2+ brands at Stage 2.
playdate + pocket-operator + divoom. Nothing Phone excluded (comparable_bet_seed). Stage 1-2. No mechanism or enhanced claims in cell. Space open for mechanism-level differentiation.
pocket-operator only. Single brand — below anti-fluke floor of 2+. Not an established market in this data set.
